improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access with membership."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Get instant AI answers for trade and business. Try three free searches, then unlock full access with flexible membership plans.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the value proposition and free trial offer. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical channels for reaching business professionals. These tags establish credibility before users even visit the site.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Meet Gideon — get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business decisions. Try 3 free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This copy immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant for trade/business), highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support), and creates a clear, low-friction CTA by emphasizing the free trial. The word 'Meet' personalizes the AI while keeping the professional tone. Mentioning '3 free searches' sets clear expectations and reduces hesitation.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan to continue. Plans start from just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual billing saving you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited access to Gideon's workspace, voice chat, and full trade and business support.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the primary conversion point—the paywall after the free trial. It removes uncertainty about what happens next, reinforces the low entry price, highlights the annual savings incentive, and reminds prospects of the full member benefits, all of which reduce friction and encourage sign-up.
